title: Rich Smoky Norwegian Salmon Skewers
description: Indulge in the rich flavors of Norway with these smoky salmon skewers, featuring a unique blend of smoky aioli and ayurvedic tamasic friendly ingredients, all on a crispy and indulgent backdrop of brine wet salmon.

ingredients.name: brine solution
ingredients.notes: 1/2 cup kosher salt, 1/2 cup brown sugar, 1 gallon water

instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, whisk together smoky aioli, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Place the salmon fillets in a large bowl and brush the smoky aioli mixture evenly over both sides of the salmon.
Place the salmon fillets in the brine solution and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the salmon from the brine solution and cut into 1 inch pieces.
Thread the salmon pieces onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, flipping halfway through, until the salmon is cooked through and slightly charred.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
